eddie.name: Eddie
eddie.description:
<c=e6e164>EDDIE</c>
Your ship's electrician. Their cards offer <c=keyword>flexible</c> ways to <c=keyword>spend, store and gain</c> <c=energy>energy</c>.

ship.name: Apollo
ship.description: A battle-ready solar sail with restrictive movement but potent strafing capabilities.

ShortCircuit.name: Short-Circuit
ShortCircuit.description: If your total <c=energy>ENERGY</c> doesn't decrease from playing this card, discard the 2 leftmost cards in hand.

Cheap.name: Cheap
Cheap.description: This card starts each combat with a <c=cardtrait>discount</c>.

CardSelectAddShortCircuitAndMakeCheaperF.cardSelect: Select a card to make cheaper but <c=downside>add <c=cardtrait>short-circuit</c> to</c>, forever.

ADiscountHand.name: Discount Hand
ADiscountHand.description: <c=cardtrait>Discounts</c> every card in your hand by 1 energy.

AVariableHintEnergy.description: <c=action>X</c> = Your <c=energy>ENERGY</c> after paying for this card{{Parentheses}}.

PowerCell.name: Power Cell
PowerCell.description: Blocks one attack. Gain 1 <c=energy>ENERGY</c> when this is destroyed.

Circuit.name: circuit
Circuit.description: Gain {0} <c=status>CLOSED CIRCUIT</c> at the start of your turn.

ClosedCircuit.name: closed circuit
ClosedCircuit.description: When a card would be <c=keyword>discarded</c> (including from being played), lose 1 <c=status>CLOSED CIRCUIT</c> instead.

MoreEnergy.name: more energy
MoreEnergy.description: Gain {0} <c=energy>ENERGY</c> at the start of every turn.

EmergencyThrusters.name: THE CHARIOT
EmergencyThrusters.description: Gain 1 <c=status>STRAFE</c> on the first turn. <c=downside>When you move using <c=status>EVADE</c>, take 1 damage.

DeconstructionGoggles.name: DECONSTRUCTION GOGGLES
DeconstructionGoggles.description: At the start of combat, gain 2 <c=card>Reverse-Engineers</c>.

CircuitBoard.name: CIRCUIT BOARD
CircuitBoard.description: Gain 2 <c=status>CLOSED CIRCUIT</c> on the first turn.

ElectromagneticCoil.name: ELECTROMAGNETIC COIL
ElectromagneticCoil.description: If you end your turn with more than 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>, gain 1 <c=status>EVADE</c>.

FrazzledWires.name: FRAZZLED WIRES
FrazzledWires.description: Choose a card in your deck that costs 1 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>. Its cost is reduced by 1. <c=downside>It gains <c=cardtrait>short-circuit</c>.

FissionChamber.name: FISSION CHAMBER
FissionChamber.description: All <c=keyword>X</c> values on cards are increased by 1.

SunLamp.name: SUN LAMP
SunLamp.description: At the end of each turn where you didn't move using <c=status>EVADE</c>, gain 1 <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c>.

SolarPanels.name: SOLAR PANELS
SolarPanels.description: Gain 1 extra <c=energy>ENERGY</c> each turn. <c=downside>The first time you move using EVADE in a turn, gain 1 less energy next turn.</c>

EmergencyVentilator.name: EMERGENCY VENTILATOR
EmergencyVentilator.description: If you end your turn with more than 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>, lose 2 <c=status>HEAT</c>.

OverdriveFeedback.name: OVERDRIVE FEEDBACK
OverdriveFeedback.description: If you end your turn with more than 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>, your <c=status>OVERDRIVE</c> doesn't decrease.

PerfectInsulation.name: PERFECT INSULATION
PerfectInsulation.description: The first time each combat you would gain <c=status>SHIELD</c> above your maximum, gain 2 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.

Spellboard.name: SPELLBOARD
Spellboard.description: All cards with active shard costs you can pay are <c=cardtrait>infinite</c>.

Thunderstrike.name: THUNDER-STRIKE
Thunderstrike.description: Whenever the enemy moves during your turn, they lose hull equal to the distance moved.

UltraLightBatteries.name: ULTRA-LIGHT BATTERIES
UltraLightBatteries.description: When you run out of energy after playing a card, gain a <c=card>Lightweight</c>.

VersionControl.name: VERSION CONTROL
VersionControl.description: Every 4th time you exhaust a card, gain 1 <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.

description.None:
X = <c=energy>ENERGY</c>
Add X <c=card>Surges</c> to your draw pile, lose all <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.
description.A:
X = <c=energy>ENERGY</c>
Add X <c=card>Surge As</c> to your draw pile, lose all <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.
description.B:
X = <c=energy>ENERGY</c>
Add X <c=card>Surge Bs</c> to your draw pile, lose all <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.

description.None: Choose a card in hand. It costs 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c> once per turn.
description.A: Choose a card in hand. It costs 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c> once per turn.
description.B: <c=downside>Discard</c> a card in hand. It costs 0 <c=energy>ENERGY</c> once per turn.

cardSelectText.discard: Choose a card to make free for the rest of the combat, then discard it.
cardSelectText.normal: Choose a card to make free for the rest of the combat.

RenewableResource.name: Renewable Resource

description.None: Choose a <c=keyword>hand</c> card to make <c=cardtrait>infinite</c> and <c=cardtrait>short-circuit</c> this combat.
description.A: Choose a <c=keyword>hand</c> card to make <c=cardtrait>infinite</c> and <c=cardtrait>short-circuit</c> this combat.
description.B: Choose two <c=keyword>hand</c> cards to make  <c=cardtrait>infinite</c> and <c=cardtrait>short-circuit</c> this combat.

RenewableResource.cardSelectText: Choose a card to make <c=cardtrait>infinite</c> and <c=downside>short-circuit</c> for the rest of the combat.

description.None: Choose a card in hand. <c=keyword>Exhaust</c> it and gain its cost as <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.
description.A: Choose a card in hand. <c=keyword>Discard</c> it and gain its cost as <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.
description.B: Choose a card in hand. <c=keyword>Exhaust</c> it and gain its cost as <c=energy>ENERGY</c>.
